tools.name: create_capture
tools.description: Drops raw text/JSON into the Inbox (safe default for bots). A human reviews and converts it.

tenant_id.description: The organization or workspace ID (if multi-tenant).

text.description: Raw text or JSON payload the bot wants to save.

suggested_type.description: Hint for the human reviewer on what kind of domain record this might become (e.g. 'invoice', 'lead').

tools.name: search_[RESOURCE_NAME]s
tools.description: Searches domain records by keyword. Use this before creating to avoid duplicates.

tools.name: create_[RESOURCE_NAME]
tools.description: Creates a new domain record directly. Requires write:[RESOURCE_NAME]s scope.

tools.name: update_[RESOURCE_NAME]
tools.description: Updates specific fields on an existing record. Requires write:[RESOURCE_NAME]s scope.

id.description: The ID of the record to update.

patch.description: Partial update fields matching the discovered schema constraint.

tools.name: create_link
tools.description: Links two domain records together with a named relation (if applicable to the domain). Requires write:links scope.

relation.description: The discovered relationship between the two records (e.g., 'billed_to').
